data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for calendar synchronization, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of this feature. The prior steps focus on booking processes and do not address the calendar sync requirement, indicating a clear gap in the evidence needed to support this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of calendar sync (Google/Outlook).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
